title: Hody and Decken Make a Deal
description: On pages 2–5, this part follows Unknown person #1, Hody Jones, Vander Decken, King Neptune, Shirahoshi, Luffy, Zoro. The core story beat is hody and decken make a deal.
scene: The scene centers on hody and decken make a deal, with Unknown person #1, Hody Jones, Vander Decken, King Neptune, Shirahoshi, Luffy, Zoro driving the moment.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: I am going out without your permission...!! I will be back in time for dinner!!

summary: Hody and Decken Make a Deal. This part advances the crew from their post-timeskip reunion into the undersea route and the first conflicts surrounding Fish-Man Island.
